result.stdout:
Usage: [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Options:
  -i|--input <string>              The location of all the API files (Required)
  -o|--output <string>             The location to put all the markdown files (Required)
  --base-slug <string>             The base slug to use in urls (Default: @"reference")
  --group-by <GroupingStrategy>    Group documentation by assembly or namespace (Default: Assembly)
  --dont-clear                     Don't clear the output location before generating files (Optional)
  --verbose                        Print extra information (Optional)
